name: @zhushanwen/pi-goal
description: Codex-style /goal command — persistent goal-driven autonomous loop with evidence-based completion, token/time budgets, blocked detection, and steering templates.

name: @zhushanwen/pi-todo
description: AI-driven todo list — stateful task management with session persistence and /todos command.

name: @zhushanwen/pi-subagents
description: Spawned-process agent execution runtime — unified execute entry, isolated state, sync/background modes.

name: @zhushanwen/pi-workflow
description: Multi-agent workflow orchestration — stateful workflow management with persistence, state machine, and execution tracing.

name: @zhushanwen/pi-structured-output
description: Structured output tool — enforces JSON Schema via tool call mechanism with Ajv validation.
